amendatorysection.catchline: Sexual abuse of an inmate, parolee, probationer, or problem solving court participant in the first degree; penalty.
amendatorysection.para: Any person who subjects an inmate, a parolee, a probationer, or a problem solving court participant to sexual penetration in violation of section 28-322.01 is guilty of sexual abuse of an inmate, a parolee, a probationer, or a problem solving court participant in the first degree. Sexual abuse of an inmate, a parolee, a probationer, or a problem solving court participant in the first degree is a Class IIA felony.

crossreference.para: Registration of sex offenders, see sections 29-4001 to 29-4014.

annotation.para: As used in this section, the word "subject" means to cause to undergo the action of something specified. State v. Loyuk, 289 Neb. 967, 857 N.W.2d 833 (2015).
